zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Whiting於1435年1月10日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特時，他的父親Sir Richard Whiting30歲，母親Lady Mary Harman29歲。他於1455年與Lady Elizabeth Tims在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Whiting
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Whiting (Old English Hwīting, a patronymic from the personal name Hwīta, from hwīt ‘white’ applied as a nickname).
History: Rev. Samuel Whiting arrived in Boston, MA, in May 1636, and made his home in Lynn, MA.

variants.name: Witting
meanings: North German: habitational name from a place called Wittingen, near Braunschweig.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Whiting was born on 10 January 1435, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Whiting, was 30 and his mother, Lady Mary Harman, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Tims in 1455, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1478, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Whiting est né le 10 janvier 1435, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Whiting, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Harman, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Tims en 1455, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Whiting am 10. Januar 1435 in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Whiting 30 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Harman 29. Er hat 1455 in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Tims geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1478 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Whiting è nato il il 10 gennaio 1435 nel Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Whiting, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Harman, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Tims nel 1455, nel Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1478, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Whitingが1435年1月10日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Whitingは30歳，母Lady Mary Harmanは29歳であった。1455年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットでLady Elizabeth Timsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Whiting(이)가 1435년 1월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Whiting(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Harman(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 Lady Elizabeth Tims(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Whiting nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1435, em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Whiting, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Harman, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Tims em 1455, em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1478, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Whiting родился 10 января 1435 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Whiting было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Harman, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Tims в 1455 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1478 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
